debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
hmax : IsMin D
x y : PersistenceSubmodule M
hxy : Disjoint x y
hN : x ⊔ y ∈ D
hx : ¬x = ⊥
hy : ¬y = ⊥
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := ⋯
⊢ ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN

failed_attempts: (fun N hN ↦ by simp [B]; split_ifs <;> simp [hx, hy, hN, D.not_bot_mem])
(fun N hN ↦ by dsimp [B]; split_ifs <;> simp [hx, hy]; intro h; cases h; exact D.not_bot_mem hN)
(fun N hN ↦ by simp [B]; split_ifs <;> [simp [hx, hy]; intro h; exact D.not_bot_mem (h ▸ hN)])
(fun N hN h => by simp [B] at h; split_ifs at h <;> simp_all [D.not_bot_mem])
(fun N hN ↦ by intro h; simp [B] at h; split_ifs at h <;> cases h <;> contradiction)
(fun N hN => by simp [B]; split_ifs; simp [hx, hy]; exact fun h => D.not_bot_mem (h ▸ hN))
(fun N hN => by simp [B]; split_ifs; { simp [hx, hy] }; { intro h; rw [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at h; exact D.not_bot_mem (h ▸ hN) })
(fun N hN => by dsimp [B]; split_ifs; · simp [hx, hy]; · rintro rfl; exact D.not_bot_mem hN)
(fun N hN ↦ by simp [B]; split_ifs <;> [simp [hx, hy]; exact fun h ↦ D.not_bot_mem (h ▸ hN)])
(fun N hN hb ↦ by simp [B] at hb; split_ifs at hb; cases hb <;> contradiction; exact D.not_bot_mem (hb ▸ hN))
(by intro N hN; split_ifs <;> simp [hx, hy]; rintro rfl; exact D.not_bot_mem hN)
(λ N hN => by simp [B]; split_ifs <;> [simp [hx, hy]; exact fun h => D.not_bot_mem (h ▸ hN)])
(fun N hN => by dsimp [B]; split_ifs; simp [hx, hy]; intro h; subst h; exact D.not_bot_mem hN)
(by intro N hN; simp [B]; split_ifs <;> [simp [hx, hy]; (intro h; subst h; exact D.not_bot_mem hN)])
(fun N hN => by split_ifs <;> simp [hx, hy, hN, D.not_bot_mem])
(fun N hN => by simp [B]; split_ifs; · simp [hx, hy]; · rintro rfl; exact D.not_bot_mem hN)
(fun N hN => by simp [B]; split_ifs <;> [simp [hx, hy]; (rintro rfl; exact D.not_bot_mem hN)])
(fun N hN => by simp [B]; split_ifs <;> (simp [hx, hy]; intro h; rw [h] at hN; exact D.not_bot_mem hN))
(fun N hN => by simp [B]; split_ifs <;> aesop)
(fun N hN ↦ by simp [B]; split_ifs; · simp [*]; · intro h; subst h; exact D.not_bot_mem hN)
(fun N hN => by simp [B]; split_ifs; · simp [hx, hy]; · intro h; exact D.not_bot_mem (h ▸ hN))
(fun N hN ↦ by simp [B]; split_ifs <;> (intro h; cases h <;> (try subst h); contradiction <|> exact D.not_bot_mem hN))
(fun N hN ↦ by simp [B]; split_ifs <;> aesop)
(fun N hN ↦ by simp [B]; split_ifs <;> intro h <;> simp_all [hx, hy, D.not_bot_mem])
(by intro N hN; simp [B]; split_ifs <;> aesop)
(by intro N hN; split_ifs; · simp [hx, hy]; · exact mt (· ▸ hN) D.not_bot_mem)
(fun N hN => by split_ifs <;> simp [*, D.not_bot_mem])
(fun N hN ↦ by dsimp [B]; split_ifs <;> aesop)
(fun N hN ↦ by dsimp [B]; split_ifs <;> simp [hx, hy, hN, D.not_bot_mem])
(by intro N hN; simp [B]; split_ifs <;> simp [hx, hy]; rintro rfl; exact D.not_bot_mem hN)
(fun N hN ↦ by simp [B]; split_ifs <;> aesop)
(fun N hN => by dsimp [B]; split_ifs <;> aesop)
